name: gate_b_skill_replay
description: Release Gate B contract: a promoted Task Atlas skill draft can replay the read-only triad workflow guidance deterministically.

expectedContract.precondition: Record the triad activity, promote it with the Task Atlas To Skills action or unreal.skill_distill_from_activity, and keep the resulting draft at Saved/UnrealMcp/SkillDrafts/gate_b_triad.skill.md or another known skillPath.
expectedContract.assertion: unreal.skill_apply on the draft returns success and its workflow guidance lists the three tool names in the same order.

procedure: Promote the activity through Task Atlas To Skills or call /tool unreal.skill_distill_from_activity with the recorded sessionId and skillName gate_b_triad.
Accept only if the response succeeds and the returned skill text lists unreal.editor.engine_version, unreal.project_settings_get, and unreal.list_assets in that order.
